name: Consultation
description: Live consultation sessions with transcription, consent, and AI analysis

screens.name: Patient Consultation View
screens.description: 3-phase consultation: decrypt (consent) -> session (live transcript) -> results (AI analysis)

components.name: DecryptRequest
components.description: Amber-bordered consent card. Shows doctor name, wallet address, requested record types. Approve triggers usePasskey().verify(), then 4s timeout advances to session phase.

components.name: CreFeed
components.description: CRE workflow feed for provider-decryption, isActive during processing

components.name: LiveTranscript
components.description: Scrollable transcript with Start/Stop mic and Demo button. Uses AssemblyAI for real transcription. onTranscriptComplete advances to results.

components.name: AiResults
components.description: Tabbed display: SOAP note, Summary + risk scores, ICD-10/CPT codes, Drug interactions with severity badges

actions.label: Kosyn
actions.description: App logo — Shield icon + 'Kosyn' text, navigates to home page

actions.label: Dashboard
actions.description: Nav link to patient dashboard

actions.label: Records
actions.description: Nav link to health records page

actions.label: Book
actions.description: Nav link to booking wizard

actions.label: Sign In
actions.description: Opens Thirdweb Connect wallet modal — email/social login for patients

actions.label: 0.00 KUSD
actions.description: KUSD balance badge — CircleDollarSign icon + formatted balance + KUSD label. Reads from KosynUSD contract on-chain. Only visible when connected

actions.label: Deposit
actions.description: Opens deposit modal — dashed emerald border button with Plus icon. Shows 'Coming soon' placeholder

actions.label: Sepolia
actions.description: Network indicator badge — colored dot + chain name from CHAIN_META lookup. Only visible when connected

actions.label: 0x7458...5B78
actions.description: GradientAvatar + Thirdweb detailsButton — opens wallet details panel. Only visible when connected

actions.label: Approve with Passkey
actions.description: Triggers handleDecryptApprove — usePasskey().verify() calls navigator.credentials.get(), on success sets creActive=true and starts 4s timeout to session phase. Shows Fingerprint icon. Phase: decrypt only

actions.label: Deny
actions.description: Denies provider access request — calls onDeny callback. Shows X icon. Phase: decrypt only

actions.label: Awaiting Approval / In Session / Completed
actions.description: Phase badge — amber for decrypt, green for session, blue for results. Reflects current phase state variable

states.name: Awaiting Approval
states.description: Patient sees consent card, must approve with passkey. DecryptRequest card on left, CreFeed sidebar on right

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: Nav logo link — navigates to landing page (/). Renders Shield icon + 'Kosyn' text. Source: hardcoded in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Dashboard: Nav link to /patients/dashboard — patient's main hub. Highlighted when pathname matches. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Records: Nav link to /patients/records — patient health records list. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Book: Nav link to /patients/book — schedule new consultation. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Sign In: Thirdweb ConnectButton label for patients (not yet connected). Opens email/social login modal. Source: connectButton.label in NavHeader WalletSection
elementDescriptions.0.00: KUSD token balance — reads from KosynUSD.balanceOf(account) on-chain. Formatted to 2 decimal places. Shows 0.00 when no balance. Only visible when connected. Source: KusdBadge component
elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token symbol label next to balance. Only visible when connected. Source: hardcoded in KusdBadge component
elementDescriptions.Sepolia: Active network name badge — reads from useActiveWalletChain(). Displays chain name from CHAIN_META lookup (11155111 = Sepolia). Shows colored dot indicator. Only visible when connected. Source: NetworkBadge component
elementDescriptions.Deposit: Opens deposit modal for KUSD — currently shows 'Coming soon' placeholder. Dashed emerald border button with Plus icon. Only visible when connected. Source: DepositButton component
elementDescriptions.0x7458...5B78: Connected wallet address — GradientAvatar + truncated display from Thirdweb detailsButton. Full address: 0x7458ee961D5147D169F954181d158AD0bf635B78. Only visible when connected
elementDescriptions.Consultation #1: Page heading — dynamic consultation ID from URL params.id. Renders as h1 with text-2xl font-bold. Source: useParams().id
elementDescriptions.Dr. Sarah Chen — Internal Medicine: Subtitle under heading — doctor name and specialty. Demo: hardcoded in PatientConsultationPage. Production: fetched from ProviderRegistry.getProvider(consultationRecord.providerAddress)
elementDescriptions.Awaiting Approval: Amber status badge — consent required before session starts. bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border-amber-500/20. Source: phase state === 'decrypt' in PatientConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Decrypt Request: CardTitle of the consent card — amber-bordered Card. Shows ShieldAlert icon + title text. Source: DecryptRequest component CardHeader
elementDescriptions.Dr. Sarah Chen is requesting access to y: Consent explanation text — combines doctorName prop ('Dr. Sarah Chen') with static suffix. Source: DecryptRequest component paragraph
elementDescriptions.0x1111...1111: Doctor's on-chain wallet address — displayed as monospace code block. Source: doctorAddress prop passed from PatientConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Requested record types:: Label above record type badges. Source: hardcoded text in DecryptRequest component
elementDescriptions.health: Record type badge — one of the requested record types. Source: recordTypes prop array ['health', 'prescription'] passed from PatientConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.prescription: Record type badge — second requested record type. Source: recordTypes prop array ['health', 'prescription'] passed from PatientConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Records will be decrypted inside a CRE T: Privacy notice line 1 — informs patient that decryption happens in Trusted Execution Environment. Source: hardcoded in DecryptRequest info box
elementDescriptions.Access is ephemeral and auto-revokes aft: Privacy notice line 2 — explains temporary access model. Source: hardcoded in DecryptRequest info box
elementDescriptions.All access is logged on-chain with CRE a: Privacy notice line 3 — explains audit trail. Source: hardcoded in DecryptRequest info box
elementDescriptions.Approve with Passkey: Primary action button — triggers WebAuthn navigator.credentials.get() via usePasskey().verify(). On success, calls onApprove which sets creActive=true and starts 4s timeout to session phase. Shows Fingerprint icon. Source: DecryptRequest Button
elementDescriptions.Deny: Secondary outline button — calls onDeny callback (currently no-op). Shows X icon. Source: DecryptRequest Button
elementDescriptions.CRE Workflow: Sidebar card title — shows Cpu icon + 'CRE Workflow' text. Displays provider-decryption workflow steps: 'ACE policy check', 'Decrypting in TEE'. Steps animate from pending -> processing -> done when isActive=true. Source: CreFeed component with workflow='provider-decryption'
elementDescriptions.ACE policy check: CRE workflow step 1 — verifies patient consent via ACE PolicyEngine smart contract. Source: getWorkflowSteps('provider-decryption') in cre.ts
elementDescriptions.Decrypting in TEE: CRE workflow step 2 — decrypts patient records inside CRE Trusted Execution Environment. Source: getWorkflowSteps('provider-decryption') in cre.ts

states.name: Live Session
states.description: Passkey approved, live transcript streaming. LiveTranscript card on left, CreFeed sidebar on right (completed steps)

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: Nav logo link — navigates to landing page (/). Renders Shield icon + 'Kosyn' text. Source: hardcoded in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Dashboard: Nav link to /patients/dashboard — patient's main hub. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Records: Nav link to /patients/records — patient health records list. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Book: Nav link to /patients/book — schedule new consultation. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Sign In: Thirdweb ConnectButton label for patients. Source: connectButton.label in NavHeader WalletSection
elementDescriptions.0.00: KUSD token balance from KosynUSD.balanceOf(account). Source: KusdBadge component
elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token symbol label next to balance. Source: hardcoded in KusdBadge
elementDescriptions.Sepolia: Active network name badge from useActiveWalletChain(). Source: CHAIN_META in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Deposit: Opens deposit modal for KUSD. Source: DepositButton in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.0x7458...5B78: Connected wallet address — truncated. Source: Thirdweb detailsButton
elementDescriptions.Consultation #1: Page heading — dynamic consultation ID from URL params.id. Source: useParams().id rendered as h1
elementDescriptions.Dr. Sarah Chen — Internal Medicine: Subtitle under heading — doctor name and specialty. Source: hardcoded in PatientConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.In Session: Green status badge — live consultation in progress. Was 'Awaiting Approval' (amber) before passkey verification. Source: phase state === 'session' in PatientConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Live Transcript: CardTitle of transcript card — shows Radio icon (red pulsing when recording, muted when idle) + 'Live Transcript' text. Real-time streaming doctor-patient conversation. Source: LiveTranscript component CardHeader
elementDescriptions.Start: Mic toggle button (default state) — clicks handleToggle which calls startTranscription() from AssemblyAI lib, sets isRecording=true. Shows Mic icon. Source: LiveTranscript Button
elementDescriptions.Stop: Mic toggle button (recording state) — clicks handleToggle which calls stopTranscription() and fires onTranscriptComplete with final entries. Shows MicOff icon, destructive variant. Source: LiveTranscript Button
elementDescriptions.Demo: Adds mock transcript entries for demo — cycles through 8 predefined doctor/patient exchanges about headaches. Source: addMockEntry() in LiveTranscript
elementDescriptions.No transcript yet. Start recording or cl: Empty state placeholder — shown when entries.length === 0. Centered muted text in ScrollArea. Source: LiveTranscript conditional render
elementDescriptions.Doctor: Speaker label for doctor transcript entries — displayed as text-xs font-medium text-primary. Source: entry.speaker from AssemblyAI or mock data (speakers[0])
elementDescriptions.Patient: Speaker label for patient transcript entries — displayed as text-xs font-medium text-primary. Source: entry.speaker from AssemblyAI or mock data (speakers[1])
elementDescriptions.Can you describe the headaches you've be: Mock transcript line 1 (Doctor) — first demo entry. Source: texts[0] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.They usually start in the morning, a dul: Mock transcript line 2 (Patient) — second demo entry. Source: texts[1] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.How long have they been going on?: Mock transcript line 3 (Doctor). Source: texts[2] in addMockEntry()
Mock transcript line 4 (Patient). Source: texts[3] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.Are you taking any medication currently?: Mock transcript line 5 (Doctor). Source: texts[4] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.Just ibuprofen occasionally, and my Lisi: Mock transcript line 6 (Patient). Source: texts[5] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.Any changes in vision or nausea with the: Mock transcript line 7 (Doctor). Source: texts[6] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.No vision changes, but some mild nausea: Mock transcript line 8 (Patient). Source: texts[7] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.CRE Workflow: Sidebar card title — shows provider-decryption workflow steps (already completed in this phase). Source: CreFeed component with workflow='provider-decryption' and isActive=false
elementDescriptions.ACE policy check: CRE workflow step 1 (completed) — ACE PolicyEngine verification done. Source: getWorkflowSteps('provider-decryption')
elementDescriptions.Decrypting in TEE: CRE workflow step 2 (completed) — records decrypted in TEE. Source: getWorkflowSteps('provider-decryption')

states.name: Completed -- AI Results
states.description: Consultation ended, AI analysis displayed. AiResults card on left, CreFeed sidebar on right (completed steps)

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: Nav logo link — navigates to landing page (/). Source: hardcoded in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Dashboard: Nav link to /patients/dashboard. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Records: Nav link to /patients/records. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Book: Nav link to /patients/book. Source: patientLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Sign In: Thirdweb ConnectButton label for patients. Source: NavHeader WalletSection
elementDescriptions.0.00: KUSD token balance. Source: KusdBadge reading KosynUSD.balanceOf(account)
elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token symbol label. Source: hardcoded in KusdBadge

elementDescriptions.Deposit: Opens deposit modal. Source: DepositButton in NavHeader

elementDescriptions.Consultation #1: Page heading — dynamic consultation ID from URL params.id. Source: useParams().id rendered as h1
elementDescriptions.Dr. Sarah Chen — Internal Medicine: Subtitle under heading. Source: hardcoded in PatientConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Completed: Blue status badge — consultation finished, AI results available. Progression: Awaiting Approval (amber) -> In Session (green) -> Completed (blue). Source: phase state === 'results' in PatientConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.AI Clinical Analysis: CardTitle of results card — displays Gemini 2.0 Flash TEE analysis. Raw transcript never left the enclave, only structured analysis returned. Source: AiResults component CardHeader
elementDescriptions.Generated by Gemini 2.0 Flash inside CRE: Subtitle under AI Clinical Analysis title — explains provenance and privacy guarantees. Source: hardcoded paragraph in AiResults CardHeader
elementDescriptions.SOAP Note: Tab trigger for SOAP note view — renders subjective/objective/assessment/plan sections. Source: TabsTrigger value='soap' in AiResults Tabs
elementDescriptions.Summary: Tab trigger for summary + risk scores view. Source: TabsTrigger value='summary' in AiResults Tabs
elementDescriptions.Codes: Tab trigger for ICD-10 and CPT medical codes view. Source: TabsTrigger value='codes' in AiResults Tabs
elementDescriptions.Interactions: Tab trigger for drug interactions view with severity badges. Source: TabsTrigger value='interactions' in AiResults Tabs
elementDescriptions.SUBJECTIVE: SOAP section header (uppercase) — label for patient-reported symptoms. Source: section name rendered via .map() in AiResults, text-xs font-medium uppercase
elementDescriptions.Patient reports persistent headaches for: SOAP Subjective content — patient-reported symptoms from AI analysis. Demo: static mockResults object. Production: returned from CRE TEE. Source: mockResults.soapNote.subjective in AiResults
elementDescriptions.OBJECTIVE: SOAP section header (uppercase) — label for clinician observations. Source: section name rendered via .map() in AiResults
elementDescriptions.BP 130/85 mmHg, HR 72 bpm, Temp 98.6F. A: SOAP Objective content — clinical examination findings. Demo: static mockResults object. Production: returned from CRE TEE. Source: mockResults.soapNote.objective in AiResults
elementDescriptions.ASSESSMENT: SOAP section header (uppercase) — label for clinical assessment. Source: section name rendered via .map() in AiResults
elementDescriptions.Tension-type headache, likely stress-rel: SOAP Assessment content — diagnosis from AI analysis. Demo: static mockResults object. Production: returned from CRE TEE. Source: mockResults.soapNote.assessment in AiResults
elementDescriptions.PLAN: SOAP section header (uppercase) — label for treatment plan. Source: section name rendered via .map() in AiResults
elementDescriptions.1. Continue Ibuprofen 400mg PRN (max 3/d: SOAP Plan content — treatment plan from AI analysis. Demo: static mockResults object. Production: returned from CRE TEE. Source: mockResults.soapNote.plan in AiResults
elementDescriptions.32-year-old patient with 2-week history: Summary tab main text — AI-generated clinical summary. Demo: static mockResults object. Production: returned from CRE TEE. Source: mockResults.summary in AiResults
elementDescriptions.Risk Scores: Label above risk score grid in Summary tab. Source: hardcoded uppercase text in AiResults summary TabsContent
elementDescriptions.cardiovascular: Risk category label — cardiovascular risk. Source: Object.entries(mockResults.riskScores) key, rendered with capitalize class
elementDescriptions.25/100: Cardiovascular risk score value — green (<=25). Source: mockResults.riskScores.cardiovascular = 25, formatted as val/100
elementDescriptions.metabolic: Risk category label — metabolic risk. Source: riskScores key
elementDescriptions.18/100: Metabolic risk score value — green (<=25). Source: mockResults.riskScores.metabolic = 18
elementDescriptions.respiratory: Risk category label — respiratory risk. Source: riskScores key
elementDescriptions.5/100: Respiratory risk score value — green (<=25). Source: mockResults.riskScores.respiratory = 5
elementDescriptions.oncological: Risk category label — oncological risk. Source: riskScores key
elementDescriptions.2/100: Oncological risk score value — green (<=25). Source: mockResults.riskScores.oncological = 2
elementDescriptions.ICD-10 Diagnoses: Label above ICD-10 code badges in Codes tab. Source: hardcoded uppercase text in AiResults codes TabsContent
elementDescriptions.G44.209 -- Tension-type headache, unspec: ICD-10 diagnosis badge — primary diagnosis code. Source: mockResults.medicalCodes.icd10[0]
elementDescriptions.I10 -- Essential hypertension: ICD-10 diagnosis badge — secondary diagnosis code. Source: mockResults.medicalCodes.icd10[1]
elementDescriptions.CPT Procedures: Label above CPT code badges in Codes tab. Source: hardcoded uppercase text in AiResults codes TabsContent
elementDescriptions.99213 -- Office visit, established patie: CPT procedure badge — primary billing code. Source: mockResults.medicalCodes.cpt[0]
elementDescriptions.95819 -- EEG with sleep: CPT procedure badge — secondary billing code. Source: mockResults.medicalCodes.cpt[1]
elementDescriptions.Ibuprofen + Lisinopril: Drug interaction pair name — shown with AlertTriangle icon. Source: mockResults.drugInteractions[0].drugs.join(' + ')
elementDescriptions.moderate: Severity badge for drug interaction — amber colored. Source: mockResults.drugInteractions[0].severity
elementDescriptions.NSAIDs may reduce the antihypertensive e: Drug interaction description text — clinical detail. Source: mockResults.drugInteractions[0].description
elementDescriptions.CRE Workflow: Sidebar card — shows provider-decryption workflow steps (completed). Source: CreFeed with workflow='provider-decryption'

steps.description: DecryptRequest shows doctor info and requested record types
Patient clicks 'Approve with Passkey', WebAuthn dialog appears
CreFeed activates, animates provider-decryption workflow steps
Patient clicks Start button in LiveTranscript
getToken() from /api/assemblyai/token, WebSocket opens to AssemblyAI
MediaRecorder captures mic, sends 250ms audio chunks
Transcript entries stream in with speaker labels and timestamps
Patient clicks Stop, onTranscriptComplete fires, phase advances to results

screens.name: Provider Consultation View
screens.description: 2-phase doctor view: session (transcript + patient vitals) -> results (AI analysis + AI editor)

components.name: LiveTranscript
components.description: Same as patient side — mic toggle, demo mode, scrollable transcript

components.name: PatientData
components.description: Inline card showing decrypted vitals: Weight 75kg, BP 130/85, Medications Lisinopril 10mg, Allergies Penicillin. 'Decrypted' badge.

components.name: CreFeed
components.description: CRE workflow feed for consultation-processing, isActive during processing

components.name: AiResults
components.description: Tab 1: SOAP note, summary, codes, interactions (same as patient side)

components.name: AiChat
components.description: Tab 2: AI Editor — streaming Claude Service chat for refining clinical notes

actions.label: Kosyn
actions.description: App logo — Shield icon + 'Kosyn' text, navigates to home page

actions.label: Dashboard
actions.description: Nav link to provider dashboard

actions.label: Register
actions.description: Nav link to provider registration/onboarding page

actions.label: Connect Wallet
actions.description: Opens Thirdweb Connect wallet modal — MetaMask for providers

actions.label: 0.00 KUSD
actions.description: KUSD balance badge — CircleDollarSign icon + formatted balance + KUSD label. Only visible when connected

actions.label: Deposit
actions.description: Opens deposit modal — dashed emerald border button with Plus icon. Only visible when connected

actions.label: Sepolia
actions.description: Network indicator badge — colored dot + chain name. Only visible when connected

actions.label: 0x7458...5B78
actions.description: GradientAvatar + Thirdweb detailsButton — opens wallet details panel. Only visible when connected

actions.label: End Consultation
actions.description: Destructive button — triggers handleTranscriptComplete which calls triggerWorkflow('consultation-processing', { consultationId, transcript }), sets creActive=true, then after 6s timeout advances to results phase. Phase: session only

actions.label: AI Results
actions.description: Tab trigger — switches to AI analysis results view (AiResults component). Phase: results only

actions.label: AI Editor
actions.description: Tab trigger — switches to AI chat editor view (AiChat component). Phase: results only

actions.label: Start
actions.description: Start real-time voice transcription via AssemblyAI. Shows Mic icon. Phase: session only

actions.label: Stop
actions.description: Stop transcription and finalize transcript. Shows MicOff icon, destructive variant. Phase: session only

actions.label: Demo
actions.description: Add mock transcript entries for demo — cycles through 8 predefined exchanges. Phase: session only

states.name: In Session
states.description: Provider sees live transcript + End Consultation button on left, Patient Data card + CreFeed sidebar on right

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: Nav logo link — navigates to landing page (/). Renders Shield icon + 'Kosyn' text. Source: hardcoded in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Dashboard: Nav link to /doctors/dashboard — provider's main hub. Source: providerLinks array in NavHeader (isProvider=true)
elementDescriptions.Register: Nav link to /doctors/onboarding — provider registration page. Source: providerLinks array in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Connect Wallet: Thirdweb ConnectButton label for providers — opens MetaMask connection. Source: connectButton.label with isProvider=true in NavHeader WalletSection
elementDescriptions.0.00: KUSD token balance from KosynUSD.balanceOf(account). Only visible when connected. Source: KusdBadge component
elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token symbol label next to balance. Only visible when connected. Source: hardcoded in KusdBadge
elementDescriptions.Sepolia: Active network name badge from useActiveWalletChain(). Only visible when connected. Source: CHAIN_META in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.Deposit: Opens deposit modal for KUSD. Only visible when connected. Source: DepositButton in NavHeader
elementDescriptions.0x7458...5B78: Connected wallet address truncated. Only visible when connected. Source: Thirdweb detailsButton
elementDescriptions.Consultation #1: Page heading — dynamic consultation ID from URL params.id. Source: useParams().id rendered as h1 in DoctorConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Patient: John D. -- Referred for headach: Subtitle under heading — patient name and referral reason. Demo: hardcoded in DoctorConsultationPage. Production: fetched from consultation booking record + HealthRecordRegistry.getPatient(address)
elementDescriptions.In Session: Green status badge — live consultation in progress. bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border-green-500/20. Source: phase state === 'session' in DoctorConsultationPage. Changes to 'Review Results' (blue) after ending consultation
elementDescriptions.Live Transcript: CardTitle of transcript card — shows Radio icon (red pulsing when recording, muted when idle) + 'Live Transcript' text. Source: LiveTranscript component CardHeader
elementDescriptions.Start: Mic toggle button (default state) — calls startTranscription() from AssemblyAI lib. Shows Mic icon. Source: LiveTranscript Button
elementDescriptions.Stop: Mic toggle button (recording state) — calls stopTranscription() and fires onTranscriptComplete. Shows MicOff icon, destructive variant. Source: LiveTranscript Button
elementDescriptions.Demo: Adds mock transcript entries — cycles through 8 predefined doctor/patient exchanges about headaches. Source: addMockEntry() in LiveTranscript
elementDescriptions.No transcript yet. Start recording or cl: Empty state placeholder — shown when entries.length === 0. Source: LiveTranscript conditional render
elementDescriptions.Doctor: Speaker label for doctor transcript entries. Source: entry.speaker from AssemblyAI or mock data
elementDescriptions.Patient: Speaker label for patient transcript entries. Source: entry.speaker from AssemblyAI or mock data
elementDescriptions.Can you describe the headaches you've be: Mock transcript line 1 (Doctor). Source: texts[0] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.They usually start in the morning, a dul: Mock transcript line 2 (Patient). Source: texts[1] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.How long have they been going on?: Mock transcript line 3 (Doctor). Source: texts[2] in addMockEntry()
Mock transcript line 4 (Patient). Source: texts[3] in addMockEntry()

elementDescriptions.Just ibuprofen occasionally, and my Lisi: Mock transcript line 6 (Patient). Source: texts[5] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.Any changes in vision or nausea with the: Mock transcript line 7 (Doctor). Source: texts[6] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.No vision changes, but some mild nausea: Mock transcript line 8 (Patient). Source: texts[7] in addMockEntry()
elementDescriptions.End Consultation: Destructive button below transcript — calls handleTranscriptComplete which triggers CRE consultation-processing workflow, adds mock transcript entry, sets creActive=true, then after 6s timeout advances to results phase. Source: Button in DoctorConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Patient Data: Sidebar card title — shows decrypted patient vitals in a bordered card. Source: CardTitle in DoctorConsultationPage sidebar Card
elementDescriptions.Health Records: Label inside patient data card — displayed with FileText icon. Source: span in DoctorConsultationPage sidebar
elementDescriptions.Decrypted: Emerald badge with Lock icon — indicates records have been decrypted via CRE TEE. Source: Badge in DoctorConsultationPage patient data card
elementDescriptions.Weight:: Vitals label — muted foreground text. Source: hardcoded span in DoctorConsultationPage patient data
elementDescriptions.75kg: Patient weight value. Demo: hardcoded placeholder. Production: decrypted PHI from CRE TEE via POST /api/cre/provider-access
elementDescriptions.BP:: Vitals label — blood pressure. Source: hardcoded span in DoctorConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.130/85 mmHg: Patient blood pressure value. Demo: hardcoded placeholder. Production: decrypted PHI from CRE TEE
elementDescriptions.Medications:: Vitals label — current medications. Source: hardcoded span in DoctorConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Lisinopril 10mg: Patient medication value. Demo: hardcoded placeholder. Production: decrypted PHI from CRE TEE
elementDescriptions.Allergies:: Vitals label — known allergies. Source: hardcoded span in DoctorConsultationPage
elementDescriptions.Penicillin: Patient allergy value. Demo: hardcoded placeholder. Production: decrypted PHI from CRE TEE
elementDescriptions.CRE Workflow: Sidebar card below patient data — shows consultation-processing workflow steps. Steps: 'Encrypting transcript', 'Stripping PII (HIPAA)', 'AI analysis (Gemini TEE)', 'Storing results on IPFS', 'Recording on-chain'. Animates when isActive=true (after End Consultation). Source: CreFeed with workflow='consultation-processing'
elementDescriptions.Encrypting transcript: CRE workflow step 1 — encrypts transcript in TEE. Source: getWorkflowSteps('consultation-processing')
elementDescriptions.Stripping PII (HIPAA): CRE workflow step 2 — removes personally identifiable information for HIPAA compliance. Source: getWorkflowSteps('consultation-processing')
elementDescriptions.AI analysis (Gemini TEE): CRE workflow step 3 — runs Gemini 2.0 Flash inside TEE enclave for clinical analysis. Source: getWorkflowSteps('consultation-processing')
elementDescriptions.Storing results on IPFS: CRE workflow step 4 — stores encrypted analysis results on IPFS via Pinata. Source: getWorkflowSteps('consultation-processing')
elementDescriptions.Recording on-chain: CRE workflow step 5 — writes result hash to HealthRecordRegistry contract. Source: getWorkflowSteps('consultation-processing')

states.name: Review Results
states.description: Consultation ended, AI analysis in Tabs (AI Results / AI Editor) on left, Patient Data card + CreFeed sidebar on right (completed steps)

appFlows.name: End consultation and get AI analysis

steps.description: Mock transcript entry added, transcript text compiled
After 6s timeout, phase advances to results with AiResults + AiChat tabs
Types refinement request in AiChat textarea
chat({ prompt, model: 'sonnet' }) streams to Claude Service
Streaming response appears in chat bubble
